description:
Event: World Honey Bee Day
Chocolate: Akesson's Bejofo Estate Madagascar 75% Honey

Celebrating World Honey Bee Day with this exquisite organic Madagascar chocolate infused with natural wildflower honey.

Event: Day of the Dead (Mexico)
Chocolate: Ritual Chocolate El Fuego

Marking Dia de los Muertos with Ritual's spiced El Fuego chocolate featuring organic Mexican cinnamon and chilis.
